locations.name: 萨鲁塔亚
locations.summary: 萨鲁塔亚（葡萄牙語：Sarutaiá）是巴西圣保罗州的一个市镇。总面积141.511平方公里，总人口4268人，人口密度30.2人/平方公里。 参见 圣保罗州市镇列表 参考

locations.name: 圣保罗州
locations.summary: 圣保罗州（葡萄牙語：São Paulo，葡萄牙語發音：[sɐ̃w̃ 'paw.lo]）是巴西的一个州，以圣保罗的名字命名。圣保罗州是巴西重要的工业和经济区。 地理 圣保罗州的面积248,209.426平方公里，人口44,411,238人（…

locations.name: 巴西
locations.summary: 巴西联邦共和国（葡萄牙語：República Federativa do Brasil），通稱巴西（Brasil），是南美洲國家，位於南美東部，東臨大西洋，人口2.15億，居世界第7。其國土大部分介于赤道和南回归线之间，面積851萬平方公…

locations.id: loc-菲利普-路德维希-施塔蒂乌斯-米勒-b9ad7727
locations.name: 菲利普·路德维希·施塔蒂乌斯·米勒
locations.summary: 菲利普·路德维希·施塔蒂乌斯·米勒（德語：Philipp Ludwig Statius Müller，1725年4月25日—1776年1月5日），德国动物学家。 米勒曾在埃朗根-纽伦堡大学教授自然科学。1773年至1776年间，他將卡爾·…

locations.name: 博奈尔
locations.summary: 博奈尔（荷蘭語：Bonaire；帕皮阿門托語：Boneiru）是加勒比海中的一个岛屿，現為荷蘭的公共实体，與同為荷蘭公共實體的聖尤斯特歇斯和薩巴合稱為「BES群島」。首府是克拉伦代克。 面积288平方公里，人口26,552人（2025年1…

relations.subject: Streaked flycatcher
relations.evidence: The streaked flycatcher (Myiodynastes maculatus) is a passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Mexico, in every South American country except El Salvador, in Trinidad and Tobago, in every mainland South American country (though only as a vagrant to Chile), and as a vagrant to Bonaire.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.evidence: The streaked flycatcher (Myiodynastes maculatus) is a passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Mexico, in every South American country except El Salvador, in Trinidad and Tobago, in every mainland South American country (though only as a vagrant to Chile), and as a vagrant to Bonaire.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Streaked flycatcher
relations.evidence: | last2=Rumboll |first2=Maurice| title =Birds of Southern South America and Antarctica | publisher =Princeton University Press | series =Princeton Illustrated Checklists | date =2001 | location =New Jersey | pages =Plate 79, map 79.5 | isbn =0-691-09035-1 }} The species has also occurred as a vagrant on Bonaire and in Chile. The streaked flycatcher inhabits the canopy and edges of a variety of forested landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones
